name: Expert Installation
description: Complete installation, setup and calibration by one of our professional engineers

name: High Gain Aerial
description: Enjoy the highest quality HDTV programming with this 8 bay Antenna. No monthly fee or subscription required,  With your HD Television (or ATSC tuner) you will be able to pick up the clearest HD signals being broadcasted in your area. The antenna easily mounts to a traditional antenna mast, providing quick and simple installation. 8Bay Multi-Directional antennas are the best type of antennas to use in North America, mostly used for homes or Businesses, they catch max amount of channels in an area with wide range reception.
